site.headline: Provide a brief description of what you do and what you are passionate about.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: Provide a brief introduction about who you are and what you focus on. This is a good place to highlight your background, what motivates you and the kind of work you are passionate about.
You can also mention any personal projects, open source contributions or side hustles that demonstrate your skills and interests.
Feel free to share your approach to engineering, what you value in systems and infrastructure and how you like to work with teams.

highlights: Provide a brief overview of your responsibilities and achievements in this role.
Focus on the impact you had, the problems you solved and the skills you applied.
Provide a brief overview of your responsibilities and achievements in this role.
Focus on the impact you had, the problems you solved and the skills you applied.

projects.title: Project One
projects.description: A short description of a project that demonstrates engineering skills.

projects.title: Project Two
projects.description: Another project showcasing platform, automation, or systems work.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Feel free to reach out if you want to connect, collaborate or just say hi.
